gpt1.name: GPT-1 (canonical, Radford et al. 2018)
gpt1.notes: Original architecture. NOT realistically trainable on browser workers — ~466MB weights shipped per task and tens of GB of activations per slice. Provided as a reference / target config.

gpt1Feasible.name: Tiny-GPT (feasible on browser workers)
gpt1Feasible.notes: Same GPT recipe at a scale a phone/laptop browser can hold. Recommended starting point for distributed runs here.
